title: [ExportVerilog] Invalid part-select on a constant
body:
The following MLIR:
```llvm
hw.module @test(..., %val0: i512, ...)
  %c0_i512 = hw.constant 0 : i512
  %c0_i32 = hw.constant 0 : i32
  %100 = comb.mux %13#6, %val0, %c0_i512 : i512
  %101 = sv.indexed_part_select %100[%c0_i32 : 64] : i512, i32
```
Generates the following SV:
```sv
wire [63:0]      _GEN_5 = _controller_out6 ? val0 : 512'h0[32'h0 +: 64];
```
Which Vitis `v++` doesn't like:
```
ERROR: [VPL 10-4982] syntax error near '[' [src/test_load_kernel_f1_s0_v0_v0.sv:316]
```
Probably the problem is with `512'h0[32'h0 +: 64];`.
